title: calophyllum venulosum var. venulosum
intro: Calophyllum venulosum var. venulosum, also known as the Veined Hard Ebony, is a plant species that belongs to the family Calophyllaceae and is native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Calophyllum venulosum var. venulosum include its potential to reduce fever, treat skin infections, and alleviate respiratory issues, as well as its role in wound healing and anti-aging. Calophyllum venulosum var. venulosum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as oils, extracts, and ointments, which can be used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
